body: Hi {{name}}, thanks for reaching out. I can help you learn about our products, check shipping options, or connect you with a specialist. What would you like to do?
Hi {{name}}, just following up to see if you had any questions about {{product}}. I am here to help whenever you are ready.
Hi {{name}}, your order summary is still available. If you would like to complete your purchase, just reply and I will send you a new secure payment link.
Hi {{name}}, your order has been confirmed! You will receive shipping details soon. If you have any questions, reply here anytime.
Hola {{nombre}}, gracias por contactarnos. Puedo ayudarte a conocer nuestros productos, revisar opciones de envío o conectarte con un asesor. ¿Qué prefieres?
Hola {{nombre}}, te hago seguimiento para ver si tienes preguntas sobre {{producto}}. Estoy aquí para ayudarte cuando estés listo/a.
